issue_title: fix: duplicated region lost when cut source overlaps destination
issue_body_preview:
### Description
Fixes a bug where the duplicated region was unintentionally removed when the cut source overlapped with the destination.
The fix avoids deleting the source area when the destination overlaps with the source, preventing loss of data during cut-and-paste operations.
This approach wa
test_description_zh: 在网格表格中选中一个区域执行剪切操作，然后将其粘贴到与原剪切区域有部分重叠的目标位置，观察粘贴后重叠区域及周围单元格的数据是否完整正确。
expected_result_zh: 剪切并粘贴到与源区域重叠的目标位置后，粘贴的数据应完整显示在目标区域，重叠部分的数据不应丢失或被意外清除，所有单元格内容正确无误。
